tool_args.label: Spring Trackwork Programs Staff Summary

payload.title: SPRING TRACKWORK PROGRAMS
payload.description: Staff summary to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules to support Switch Rehabilitations in Valley Stream, a Crossing Replacement and additional Maintenance Activities on the Montauk Branch and ADA Station Rehabilitation work at Hollis and Forest Hills.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.raw_text: MTA Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Valley Stream – Switch Rehabilitation & West Hempstead Crossing Rehabilitation
tool_args.raw_text: Valley Stream – Switch Rehabilitation & West Hempstead Crossing Rehabilitation – On the weekends of March 29-30, April 5-6, and April 12-13, one of two main tracks on the Montauk Branch between Jamaica and Rockville Centre will be out of service to support a series of switch rehabilitations in the vicinity of Valley Stream as well as grade crossing rehabilitations on the West Hempstead Branch

payload.project_name: Valley Stream – Switch Rehabilitation & West Hempstead Crossing Rehabilitation
payload.description: Switch rehabilitations in the vicinity of Valley Stream and grade crossing rehabilitations on the West Hempstead Branch

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: Montauk Branch – Crossing Replacement and Maintenance Activities
tool_args.raw_text: Montauk Branch – Crossing Replacement and Maintenance Activities – On Saturday, April 19th, all tracks between Babylon and Montauk will be out of service for a period of 30 hours while the Snake Hollow Road crossing in Bridgehampton is replaced, Tuthill Creek Bridge timber rehabilitation occurs between Sayville and Patchogue, and other track and structural maintenance is performed between Babylon and Montauk.

payload.project_name: Montauk Branch – Crossing Replacement and Maintenance Activities
payload.description: Snake Hollow Road crossing replacement in Bridgehampton, Tuthill Creek Bridge timber rehabilitation between Sayville and Patchogue, and other track and structural maintenance between Babylon and Montauk

evidence_refs.source_quote: Montauk Branch – Crossing Replacement and Maintenance Activities – On Saturday, April 19th, all tracks between Babylon and Montauk will be out of service for a period of 30 hours while the Snake Hollow Road crossing in Bridgehampton is replaced, Tuthill Creek Bridge timber rehabilitation occurs between Sayville and Patchogue, and other track and structural maintenance is performed between Babylon and Montauk.

tool_args.label: Service reduced to hourly between Penn Station and Babylon
tool_args.raw_text: service will be reduced to hourly in both directions between Penn Station and Babylon for the majority of these 48-hour weekends

payload.claim_text: With one of two main tracks out of service on the Montauk Branch between Jamaica and Rockville Centre, service will be reduced to hourly in both directions between Penn Station and Babylon for the majority of these 48-hour weekends.

evidence_refs.source_quote: service will be reduced to hourly in both directions between Penn Station and Babylon for the majority of these 48-hour weekends

tool_args.label: Bus service replaces West Hempstead Branch trains
tool_args.raw_text: bus service will replace train service on the West Hempstead Branch for a period of 48 hours

replace train service on the West Hempstead Branch for a period of 48 hours

tool_args.label: Bus service replaces train service on Montauk Branch for 30 hours
